rules.name: Failed SSH Login Attempt
rules.description: A failed SSH authentication attempt was detected.

rules.name: SSH Login Brute Force
rules.description: Multiple failed SSH login attempts from the same IP address.

rules.name: SQL Injection Attempt
rules.description: SQL injection signatures detected in the request URL or parameters.

rules.name: Directory Traversal Attempt
rules.description: Directory traversal attempt targeting sensitive files or path evasion.

rules.name: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Attempt
rules.description: XSS script execution tags detected in incoming web request.

rules.name: Sensitive Path Access
rules.description: Access attempt targeting administrative, configuration, or environment files.
